name: MainActor for UI Updates
description: All UIKit/SwiftUI updates must happen on the main thread. Use @MainActor or DispatchQueue.main.
auto_fix_hint: Annotate the function with @MainActor or wrap with await MainActor.run { }

name: Structured Concurrency Over DispatchQueue
description: Prefer Swift's structured concurrency (async/await, TaskGroup) over raw DispatchQueue for new code.
auto_fix_hint: Replace DispatchQueue.global().async with Task { } or async let

name: Actor Isolation for Shared Mutable State
description: Shared mutable state accessed from multiple concurrent contexts must be protected by an actor or @MainActor.
auto_fix_hint: Wrap the type in an actor or add @MainActor annotation

name: Task Cancellation Handling
description: Long-running Tasks must check for cancellation to avoid wasted work and resource leaks.
auto_fix_hint: Add try Task.checkCancellation() at loop checkpoints or use withTaskCancellationHandler

name: No Blocking Calls on Main Thread
description: Synchronous network calls, file I/O, or heavy computation on the main thread freeze the UI.
auto_fix_hint: Move to background Task or use async API

examples.bad:
// Called from viewDidLoad:
let data = try! Data(contentsOf: remoteURL) // ❌ Blocks main thread
